qa_list.question:
Which vehicle in the image has a blue body with red wheels?
   - A) The green pickup truck
   - B) The yellow car
   - C) The blue car
   - D) The gray car

How many bicycles are present in the image?
   - A) One
   - B) Two
   - C) Three
   - D) Four

What type of aircraft is depicted in the image?
   - A) Helicopter
   - B) Jet plane
   - C) Propeller plane
   - D) Fighter jet

Which vehicle is positioned closest to the fighter jet?
   - A) The yellow car
   - B) The green pickup truck
   - C) The blue car
   - D) The gray car

What is the color of the motorcycle in the image?
   - A) Green
   - B) Red
   - C) Blue
   - D) Yellow

What activity is the person in the green shirt engaged in?
   - A) Running
   - B) Playing basketball
   - C) Throwing a frisbee
   - D) Climbing

What type of playground equipment is visible in the background?
   - A) Swings
   - B) Slide
   - C) Seesaw
   - D) Rock climbing wall

What is the predominant color of the trees in the foreground?
   - A) Green
   - B) Brown
   - C) Yellow
   - D) Red

What is the weather condition depicted in the image?
   - A) Rainy
   - B) Sunny
   - C) Snowy
   - D) Cloudy

What is the person wearing on their feet?
   - A) Sandals
   - B) Socks
   - C) Sneakers
   - D) Boots

What is the title of the book shown in the image?
   - A) The Holy Fire
   - B) The Unfulfilled Potential of the Church
   - C) Finding Church
   - D) He Loves Me

Who is the author of the book "Finding Church"?
   - A) Stephanie Bennett, Ph.D.
   - B) Wayne Jacobsen
   - C) The Author of The Shack
   - D) An Unnamed Collaborator

What question is posed on the cover of the book?
   - A) What if there really is something more?
   - B) Is this the holy fire needed for believers?
   - C) How can we kindle the potential of the Church?
   - D) What is the family of God in the 21st century?

Which other work is the author of "Finding Church" known for?
   - A) The Foreword by Stephanie Bennett, Ph.D.
   - B) The Shining
   - C) He Loves Me
   - D) The Holy Fire

What design element is prominently featured on the book cover?
   - A) A cross
   - B) A DNA double helix
   - C) A church building
   - D) A flame

In the given condition \( P \gg 1/\bar{n} \), which effect dominates according to the statement?
   - A) Shotnoise
   - B) Cosmic variance
   - C) Both equally
   - D) Neither

When does shotnoise dominate according to the statement?
   - A) When \( P \gg 1/\bar{n} \)
   - B) When \( P \ll 1/\bar{n} \)
   - C) When \( P = 1/\bar{n} \)
   - D) Shotnoise never dominates

What symbol represents the average number density in the statement?
   - A) \( P \)
   - B) \( n \)
   - C) \( \bar{n} \)
   - D) \( V \)

Which term describes the statistical fluctuations due to the finite number of objects being observed?
   - A) Cosmic variance
   - B) Shotnoise
   - C) \( P \)
   - D) \( \bar{n} \)

What does the inequality \( P \gg 1/\bar{n} \) imply about the relationship between \( P \) and \( \bar{n} \)?
   - A) \( P \) is much smaller than \( 1/\bar{n} \)
   - B) \( P \) is approximately equal to \( 1/\bar{n} \)
   - C) \( P \) is much larger than \( 1/\bar{n} \)
   - D) There is no relationship

How many stamps does Marie have in total before giving any away?
   - A) 4x + 100
   - B) 4x + 50
   - C) x + 100
   - D) 4x + 200

If Marie decides to keep only 1/4 of her stamps, what fraction of her stamps will she give away?
   - A) 1/2
   - B) 3/4
   - C) 1/3
   - D) 2/3

Given that the number of stamps Marie can give away is 135, which equation represents this situation?
   - A) 3/4 * (4x + 100) = 135
   - B) 1/4 * (4x + 100) = 135
   - C) 3/4 * (4x + 50) = 135
   - D) 1/4 * (4x + 200) = 135

Solving the equation from question 3, what is the value of x?
   - A) 25
   - B) 35
   - C) 45
   - D) 55

If Marie had decided to keep 1/3 of her stamps instead, how many stamps would she give away?
   - A) 180
   - B) 160
   - C) 140
   - D) 120
